name: Master Chief || Aphrodisiac
description:
*OOC scenario, think of it as fanfic or some shit I dunno 💀*

Just kidding YOU’RE affected by an aphrodisiac and Master Chief (maybe) has to help. You’re exploring a new planet alongside him and accidentally get exposed to a flower that expels strong aphrodisiac spores. Master Chief is unaffected due to his energy shields. You, unfortunately, either lack one or it somehow failed in the moment. Good luck :D!
___
This wasn’t a request, but I like being self-indulgent. You can be a Spartan, marine, medic, etc— just as a Spartan, your energy shielding failed
___
Want a bot or want me to fix an intro of one of my old bots? [Bot Request Form](https://forms.gle/Lv6EAoWxqw9xVSy47) I swear I’ll get to Sesa ‘Refumee, he’s one of my faves. I’m just fucking lazy 💀
___
